title: Money Comes to Me Steadily and Easily
subtitle: An affirmation for training the expectation of effortless, consistent financial inflow
excerpt: A brief affirmation from Day 69 of a 12-week money program. The statement trains the nervous system to expect money as something that arrives without chasing — steadily, as part of a system already in place. Use it when the background belief that income requires constant effort is still active.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 69 reframe theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when money still feels like something that requires constant chasing, or when ease around income feels suspicious rather than natural.

content.text: A brief affirmation from Day 69 of a 12-week money program. Day 69 theme: celebrating stable, effortless inflow. The statement trains the expectation of money as something that arrives as part of a built system — not a lucky exception or the result of a final push, but a reliable, ongoing condition.
Say it three times in the morning. The second line, 'I welcome it', is the active part. Notice whether you accept it or resist it.
Money comes to me steadily and easily. I welcome it without needing to chase. My system keeps working even when I rest.
Adapted from the Day 69 reframe theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
